scene_title: Cristo no Monte das Oliveiras adverte
narrative_beat: Silhueta de Cristo sentado no Monte das Oliveiras com mao erguida em gesto de aviso

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a classical silhouette of Christ seated on a stone at the Mount of Olives, in white-cream robe with gold trim, eyes closed, right hand raised in a gesture of warning
subject.focal_point: the raised hand catching a halo of golden light
subject.secondary: Face respectfully rendered in classical fresco style, not photorealistic. Turbulent crimson-and-gold clouds behind him.
props: stone seat on Mount of Olives

environment.location: Mount of Olives overlooking ruined modern city

composition.foreground: Christ figure and stone in rich warm cream-gold tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white ruined modern city skyline in distance

lighting.key_light: golden sunset light from behind silhouetting the figure

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers, Renaissance fresco texture

symbolism.primary: Christ as prophetic authority announcing the deception

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
classical fresco rendering, reverent depiction, not photorealistic face
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
